# kCGImagePropertyFileSize

**Global Variable**

The size of the image file in bytes, if known.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyFileSize: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value of this key is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber].
